##RRUFFID=R150064
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(As,Sb)_6_As_4_S_14_
##LOCALITY=Jas Roux, La Chapelle En Valgaudemard, Hautes-Alpes, Provence-Alpes-Côte D'Azur, France
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Yellow braded or fibrous crystals, associated with black metallic chabournéite with conchoidal fracture (R140106), red realgar, and colorless massive or tabular celestine.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R150064
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
